translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The trees of Jehovah are satisfied, the cedars of Lebanon, which he hath planted,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Where the birds make their nests; [as for] the stork, the fir trees are her house.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The high mountains are for the wild goats; the cliffs, a refuge for the rock-badgers.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He made the moon for seasons: the sun knoweth its going down.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou makest darkness, and it is night, wherein all the beasts of the forest creep forth:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The young lions roar after the prey, and to seek their food fromGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sun ariseth, they retreat, and lay them down in their dens.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Man goeth forth unto his work, and to his labour until the evening.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: How manifold are thy works, O Jehovah! in wisdom hast thou made them all: the earth is full of thy riches.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Yonder is the great and wide sea: therein are moving things innumerable, living creatures small and great.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: There go the ships; [there] that leviathan, which thou hast formed to play therein.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These all look unto thee, that thou mayest give their food in its season:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: That thou givest unto them, they gather; thou openest thy hand, they are filled with good.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou hidest thy face, they are troubled; thou takest away their breath, they expire and return to their dust.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou sendest forth thy spirit, they are created, and thou renewest the face of the earth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The glory of Jehovah will endure for ever; Jehovah will rejoice in his works.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He looketh on the earth, and it trembleth; he toucheth the mountains, and they smoke.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will sing unto Jehovah as long as I live; I will sing psalms to myGod while I have my being.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: My meditation shall be pleasant unto him; I will rejoice in Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Sinners shall be consumed out of the earth, and the wicked shall be no more. Bless Jehovah, O my soul. Hallelujah!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Give ye thanks unto Jehovah, call upon his name; make known his acts among the peoples.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Sing unto him, sing psalms unto him; meditate upon all his wondrous works.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Glory ye in his holy name: let the heart of them rejoice that seek Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Seek Jehovah and his strength, seek his face continually;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Remember his wondrous works which he hath done, his miracles and the judgments of his mouth:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ye seed of Abraham his servant, ye sons of Jacob, his chosen ones.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He, Jehovah, is ourGod; his judgments are in all the earth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He is ever mindful of his covenant, — the word which he commanded to a thousand generations, —

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Which he made with Abraham, and of his oath unto Isaac;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he confirmed it unto Jacob for a statute, unto Israel for an everlasting covenant,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Saying, Unto thee will I give the land of Canaan, the lot of your inheritance;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: When they were a few men in number, of small account, and strangers in it.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they went from nation to nation, from one kingdom to another people.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He suffered no man to oppress them, and reproved kings for their sakes,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: [Saying,] Touch not mine anointed ones, and do my prophets no harm.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he called for a famine upon the land; he broke the whole staff of bread.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He sent a man before them: Joseph was sold for a bondman.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They afflicted his feet with fetters; his soul came into irons;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Until the time when what he said came about: the word of Jehovah tried him.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The king sent and loosed him — the ruler of peoples — and let him go free.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He made him lord of his house, and ruler over all his possessions:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To bind his princes at his pleasure, and teach his elders wisdom.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Israel came into Egypt, and Jacob sojourned in the land of Ham.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he made his people exceeding fruitful, and made them mightier than their oppressors.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He turned their heart to hate his people, to deal subtilly with his servants.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He sent Moses his servant, [and] Aaron whom he had chosen:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They set his signs among them, and miracles in the land of Ham.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He sent darkness, and made it dark; and they rebelled not against his word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He turned their waters into blood, and caused their fish to die.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Their land swarmed with frogs, — in the chambers of their kings.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He spoke, and there came dog-flies, [and] gnats in all their borders.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He gave them hail for rain, [and] flaming fire in their land;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he smote their vines and their fig-trees, and broke the trees of their borders.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He spoke, and the locust came, and the cankerworm, even without number;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they devoured every herb in their land, and ate up the fruit of their ground.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he smote every firstborn in their land, the firstfruits of all their vigour.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he brought them forth with silver and gold; and there was not one feeble among their tribes.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Egypt rejoiced at their departure; for the fear of them had fallen upon them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He spread a cloud for a covering, and fire to give light in the night.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They asked, and he brought quails, and satisfied them with the bread of heaven.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He opened the rock, and waters gushed forth; they ran in the dry places [like] a river.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For he remembered his holy word, [and] Abraham his servant;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he brought forth his people with gladness, his chosen with rejoicing;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he gave them the lands of the nations, and they took possession of the labour of the peoples:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: That they might keep his statutes, and observe his laws. Hallelujah!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Hallelujah! Give ye thanks unto Jehovah; for he is good; for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Who can utter the mighty acts of Jehovah? [who] can shew forth all his praise?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Blessed are they that keep justice, [and] he that doeth righteousness at all times.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Remember me, O Jehovah, with [thy] favour toward thy people; visit me with thy salvation:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: That I may see the prosperity of thy chosen ones, that I may rejoice in the joy of thy nation, that I may glory with thine inheritance.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: We have sinned with our fathers, we have committed iniquity, we have done wickedly.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Our fathers in Egypt considered not thy wondrous works; they remembered not the multitude of thy loving-kindnesses; but they rebelled at the sea, at the Red Sea.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Yet he saved them for his name's sake, that he might make known his might.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he rebuked the Red Sea, and it dried up; and he led them through the deeps as through a wilderness.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he saved them from the hand of him that hated [them], and redeemed them from the hand of the enemy.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And the waters covered their oppressors: there was not one of them left.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then believed they his words; they sang his praise.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They soon forgot his works; they waited not for his counsel:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they lusted exceedingly in the wilderness, and temptedGod in the desert.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then he gave them their request, but sent leanness into their soul.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they envied Moses in the camp, [and] Aaron, the saint of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The earth opened and swallowed up Dathan, and covered the company of Abiram;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And fire was kindled in their company; a flame burned up the wicked.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They made a calf in Horeb, and did homage to a molten image;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they changed their glory into the similitude of an ox that eateth grass.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They forgotGod their Saviour, who had done great things in Egypt,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Wondrous works in the land of Ham, terrible things by the Red Sea.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he said that he would destroy them, had not Moses, his chosen, stood before him in the breach, to turn away his fury, lest he should destroy [them].

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they despised the pleasant land; they believed not his word,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But murmured in their tents: they hearkened not unto the voice of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he lifted up his hand to them, that he would make them fall in the wilderness;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And that he would make their seed fall among the nations, and disperse them through the countries.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they joined themselves unto Baal-Peor, and ate the sacrifices of the dead;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they provoked [him] to anger with their doings; and a plague broke out among them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then stood up Phinehas and executed judgment, and the plague was stayed;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And that was reckoned unto him for righteousness, from generation to generation, for evermore.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they moved him to wrath at the waters of Meribah, and it went ill with Moses on their account;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For they provoked his spirit, so that he spoke unadvisedly with his lips.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They did not destroy the peoples, as Jehovah commanded them;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But they mingled with the nations, and learned their works;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they served their idols; and they were a snare unto them:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they sacrificed their sons and their daughters unto demons,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And shed innocent blood, the blood of their sons and of their daughters, whom they sacrificed unto the idols of Canaan; and the land was polluted with blood.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they were defiled with their works, and went a-whoring in their doings.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then was the anger of Jehovah kindled against his people, and he abhorred his inheritance;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he gave them into the hand of the nations; and they that hated them ruled over them:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And their enemies oppressed them, and they were brought into subjection under their hand.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Often did he deliver them; but as for them they provoked [him] by their counsel, and they were brought low by their iniquity.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But he regarded their distress, when he heard their cry;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he remembered for them his covenant, and repented according to the multitude of his loving-kindnesses;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he caused them to find compassion of all those that had carried them captives.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Save us, Jehovah ourGod, and gather us from among the nations, to give thanks unto thy holy name, [and] to triumph in thy praise.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Blessed be Jehovah theGod of Israel, from eternity and to eternity! And let all the people say, Amen! Hallelujah!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Give ye thanks unto Jehovah; for he is good; for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let the redeemed of Jehovah say so, whom he hath redeemed from the hand of the oppressor,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And gathered out of the countries, from the east and from the west, from the north and from the sea.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They wandered in the wilderness in a desert way, they found no city of habitation;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Hungry and thirsty, their soul fainted in them:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then they cried unto Jehovah in their trouble, [and] he delivered them out of their distresses,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he led them forth by a right way, that they might go to a city of habitation.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let them give thanks unto Jehovah for his loving-kindness, and for his wondrous works to the children of men;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For he hath satisfied the longing soul and filled the hungry soul with good.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Such as inhabit darkness and the shadow of death, bound in affliction and iron,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Because they had rebelled against the words ofGod, and had despised the counsel of the Most High; ...

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he bowed down their heart with labour; they stumbled, and there was none to help:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then they cried unto Jehovah in their trouble, [and] he saved them out of their distresses;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He brought them out of darkness and the shadow of death, and broke their bands in sunder.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let them give thanks unto Jehovah for his loving-kindness, and for his wondrous works to the children of men;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For he hath broken the gates of bronze, and cut asunder the bars of iron.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Fools, because of their way of transgression, and because of their iniquities, are afflicted;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Their soul abhorreth all manner of food, and they draw near unto the gates of death:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then they cry unto Jehovah in their trouble, [and] he saveth them out of their distresses;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He sendeth his word, and healeth them, and delivereth them from their destructions.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let them give thanks unto Jehovah for his loving-kindness, and for his wondrous works to the children of men,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And let them offer the sacrifices of thanksgiving, and declare his works in joyful song.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They that go down to the sea in ships, that do business in great waters,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: These see the works of Jehovah, and his wonders in the deep.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For he speaketh, and raiseth the stormy wind, which lifteth up the waves thereof:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They mount up to the heavens, they go down to the depths; their soul is melted because of trouble;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They reel to and fro, and stagger like a drunken man, and they are at their wits' end:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then they cry unto Jehovah in their trouble, and he bringeth them out of their distresses;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He maketh the storm a calm, and the waves thereof are still:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they rejoice because they are quiet; and he bringeth them unto their desired haven.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let them give thanks unto Jehovah for his loving-kindness, and for his wondrous works to the children of men;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let them exalt him also in the congregation of the people, and praise him in the session of the elders.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He maketh rivers into a wilderness, and water-springs into dry ground;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: A fruitful land into a plain of salt, for the wickedness of them that dwell therein.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He maketh the wilderness into a pool of water, and the dry land into water-springs;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And there he maketh the hungry to dwell, and they establish a city of habitation;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And sow fields, and plant vineyards, which yield fruits of increase;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he blesseth them, so that they are multiplied greatly; and he suffereth not their cattle to decrease.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they are diminished and brought low, through oppression, adversity, and sorrow:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He poureth contempt upon nobles, and causeth them to wander in a pathless waste;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But he secureth the needy one on high from affliction, and maketh [him] families like flocks.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The upright shall see it, and rejoice; and all unrighteousness shall stop its mouth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Whoso is wise, let him observe these things, and let them understand the loving-kindnesses of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: My heart is fixed, OGod: I will sing, yea, I will sing psalms, even [with] my glory.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Awake, lute and harp: I will wake the dawn.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will give thee thanks among the peoples, O Jehovah; of thee will I sing psalms among the nations:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For thy loving-kindness is great above the heavens, and thy truth is unto the clouds.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Be thou exalted above the heavens, OGod, and thy glory above all the earth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: That thy beloved ones may be delivered: save with thy right hand, and answer me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: God hath spoken in his holiness: I will exult, I will divide Shechem, and mete out the valley of Succoth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Gilead is mine, Manasseh is mine, and Ephraim is the strength of my head; Judah is my law-giver;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Moab is my wash-pot; upon Edom will I cast my sandal; over Philistia will I shout aloud.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Who will bring me into the strong city? who will lead me unto Edom?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: [Wilt] not [thou], OGod, who didst cast us off? and didst not go forth, OGod, with our armies?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Give us help from trouble; for vain is man's deliverance.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: ThroughGod we shall do valiantly; and he it is that will tread down our adversaries.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: OGod of my praise, be not silent:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For the mouth of the wicked [man] and the mouth of deceit are opened against me: they have spoken against me with a lying tongue,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And with words of hatred have they encompassed me; and they fight against me without a cause.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For my love they are mine adversaries; but I [give myself unto] prayer.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they have rewarded me evil for good, and hatred for my love.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Set a wicked [man] over him, and let [the] adversary stand at his right hand;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: When he shall be judged, let him go out guilty, and let his prayer become sin;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let his days be few, let another take his office;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let his sons be fatherless, and his wife a widow;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let his sons be vagabonds and beg, and let them seek [their bread] far from their desolate places;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let the usurer cast the net over all that he hath, and let strangers despoil his labour;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let there be none to extend kindness unto him, neither let there be any to favour his fatherless children;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let his posterity be cut off; in the generation following let their name be blotted out:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let the iniquity of his fathers be remembered with Jehovah, and let not the sin of his mother be blotted out;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let them be before Jehovah continually, that he may cut off the memory of them from the earth:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Because he remembered not to shew kindness, but persecuted the afflicted and needy man, and the broken in heart, to slay him.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he loved cursing; so let it come unto him. And he delighted not in blessing; and let it be far from him.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he clothed himself with cursing like his vestment; so let it come into his bowels like water, and like oil into his bones;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let it be unto him as a garment with which he covereth himself, and for a girdle wherewith he is constantly girded.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let this be the reward of mine adversaries from Jehovah, and of them that speak evil against my soul.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But do thou for me, Jehovah, Lord, for thy name's sake; because thy loving-kindness is good, deliver me:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For I am afflicted and needy, and my heart is wounded within me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I am gone like a shadow when it lengtheneth; I am tossed about like the locust;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: My knees are failing through fasting, and my flesh hath lost its fatness;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And I am become a reproach unto them; [when] they look upon me they shake their heads.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Help me, Jehovah myGod; save me according to thy loving-kindness:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: That they may know that this is thy hand; that thou, Jehovah, hast done it.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let them curse, but bless thou; when they rise up, let them be ashamed, and let thy servant rejoice.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let mine adversaries be clothed with confusion, and let them cover themselves with their shame as with a mantle.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will greatly celebrate Jehovah with my mouth; yea, I will praise him among the multitude.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For he standeth at the right hand of the needy, to save him from those that judge his soul.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah said unto my Lord, Sit at my right hand, until I put thine enemies [as] footstool of thy feet.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah shall send the sceptre of thy might out of Zion: rule in the midst of thine enemies.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thy people shall be willing in the day of thy power, in holy splendour: from the womb of the morning [shall come] to thee the dew of thy youth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah hath sworn, and will not repent, Thou art priest for ever after the order of Melchisedek.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The Lord at thy right hand will smite through kings in the day of his anger.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He shall judge among the nations; he shall fill [all places] with dead bodies; he shall smite through the head over a great country.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He shall drink of the brook in the way; therefore shall he lift up the head.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Hallelujah! I will celebrate Jehovah with [my] whole heart, in the council of the upright, and in the assembly.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Great are the works of Jehovah; sought out of all that delight in them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: His work is majesty and splendour, and his righteousness abideth for ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He hath made his wonders to be remembered: Jehovah is gracious and merciful.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He hath given meat unto them that fear him; he is ever mindful of his covenant.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He hath shewn his people the power of his works, to give them the heritage of the nations.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The works of his hands are truth and judgment; all his precepts are faithful:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Maintained for ever and ever, done in truth and uprightness.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He sent deliverance unto his people; he hath commanded his covenant for ever: holy and terrible is his name.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The fear of Jehovah is the beginning of wisdom; a good understanding have all they that do [his precepts]: his praise abideth for ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Hallelujah! Blessed is the man that feareth Jehovah, that delighteth greatly in his commandments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: His seed shall be mighty in the land; the generation of the upright shall be blessed.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Wealth and riches [shall be] in his house; and his righteousness abideth for ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Unto the upright there ariseth light in the darkness; he is gracious, and merciful, and righteous.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: It is well with the man that is gracious and lendeth; he will sustain his cause in judgment.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For he shall not be moved for ever: the righteous shall be in everlasting remembrance.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He shall not be afraid of evil tidings; his heart is fixed confiding in Jehovah;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: His heart is maintained, he is not afraid, until he see [his desire] upon his oppressors.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He scattereth abroad, he giveth to the needy; his righteousness abideth for ever: his horn shall be exalted with honour.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The wicked [man] shall see [it] and be vexed; he shall gnash with his teeth, and melt away: the desire of the wicked shall perish.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Hallelujah! Praise, ye servants of Jehovah, praise the name of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Blessed be the name of Jehovah, from this time forth and for evermore!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: From the rising of the sun unto the going down of the same, let Jehovah's name be praised.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah is high above all nations, his glory above the heavens.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Who is like unto Jehovah ourGod, who hath placed his dwelling on high;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Who humbleth himself to look on the heavens and on the earth?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He raiseth up the poor out of the dust; from the dung-hill he lifteth up the needy,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To set [him] among nobles, among the nobles of his people.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He maketh the barren woman to keep house, [as] a joyful mother of sons. Hallelujah!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: When Israel went out of Egypt, the house of Jacob from a people of strange language,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Judah was his sanctuary, Israel his dominion.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sea saw it and fled, the Jordan turned back;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The mountains skipped like rams, the hills like lambs.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: What ailed thee, thou sea, that thou fleddest? thou Jordan, that thou turnedst back?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ye mountains, that ye skipped like rams? ye hills, like lambs?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Tremble, thou earth, at the presence of the Lord, at the presence of theGod of Jacob,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Who turned the rock into a pool of water, the flint into a fountain of waters.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Not unto us, O Jehovah, not unto us, but unto thy name give glory, for thy loving-kindness and for thy truth's sake.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Wherefore should the nations say, Where then is theirGod?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But ourGod is in the heavens: he hath done whatsoever he pleased.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Their idols are silver and gold, the work of men's hands:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They have a mouth, and they speak not; eyes have they, and they see not;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They have ears, and they hear not; a nose have they, and they smell not;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They have hands, and they handle not; feet have they, and they walk not; they give no sound through their throat.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They that make them are like unto them, — every one that confideth in them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: O Israel, confide thou in Jehovah: he is their help and their shield.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: House of Aaron, confide in Jehovah: he is their help and their shield.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ye that fear Jehovah, confide in Jehovah: he is their help and their shield.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah hath been mindful of us: he will bless, he will bless the house of Israel; he will bless the house of Aaron;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He will bless them that fear Jehovah, both the small and the great.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah will add unto you more, unto you and unto your children.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ye are blessed of Jehovah, who made the heavens and the earth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The heavens are the heavens of Jehovah, but the earth hath he given to the children of men.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The dead praise not Jah, neither any that go down into silence;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But we will bless Jah from this time forth and for evermore. Hallelujah!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I love Jehovah, for he hath heard my voice [and] my supplications;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For he hath inclined his ear unto me, and I will call upon him during [all] my days.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The bands of death encompassed me, and the anguish of Sheol took hold of me; I found trouble and sorrow:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then called I upon the name of Jehovah: I beseech thee, Jehovah, deliver my soul.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Gracious is Jehovah and righteous; and ourGod is merciful.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah keepeth the simple: I was brought low, and he saved me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Return unto thy rest, O my soul; for Jehovah hath dealt bountifully with thee.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For thou hast delivered my soul from death, mine eyes from tears, my feet from falling.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will walk before Jehovah in the land of the living.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I believed, therefore have I spoken. As for me, I was greatly afflicted.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I said in my haste, All men are liars.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: What shall I render unto Jehovah, [for] all his benefits toward me?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will take the cup of salvation, and call upon the name of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will perform my vows unto Jehovah, yea, before all his people.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Precious in the sight of Jehovah is the death of his saints.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Yea, Jehovah! for I am thy servant; I am thy servant, the son of thy handmaid: thou hast loosed my bonds.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will offer to thee the sacrifice of thanksgiving, and will call upon the name of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will perform my vows unto Jehovah, yea, before all his people,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: In the courts of Jehovah's house, in the midst of thee, O Jerusalem. Hallelujah!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Praise Jehovah, all ye nations; laud him, all ye peoples;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For his loving-kindness is great toward us, and the truth of Jehovah [endureth] for ever. Hallelujah!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Give ye thanks unto Jehovah; for he is good; for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Oh let Israel say, that his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Oh let the house of Aaron say, that his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Oh let them that fear Jehovah say, that his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I called upon Jah in distress; Jah answered me [and set me] in a large place.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah is for me, I will not fear; what can man do unto me?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah is for me among them that help me; and I shall see [my desire] upon them that hate me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: It is better to trust in Jehovah than to put confidence in man;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: It is better to trust in Jehovah than to put confidence in nobles.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: All nations encompassed me; but in the name of Jehovah have I destroyed them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They encompassed me, yea, encompassed me; but in the name of Jehovah have I destroyed them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They encompassed me like bees; they are quenched as the fire of thorns: for in the name of Jehovah have I destroyed them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou hast thrust hard at me that I might fall; but Jehovah helped me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: My strength and song is Jah, and he is become my salvation.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The voice of triumph and salvation is in the tents of the righteous: the right hand of Jehovah doeth valiantly;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The right hand of Jehovah is exalted, the right hand of Jehovah doeth valiantly.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I shall not die, but live, and declare the works of Jah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jah hath chastened me sore; but he hath not given me over unto death.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Open to me the gates of righteousness: I will enter into them; Jah will I praise.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: This is the gate of Jehovah: the righteous shall enter therein.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will give thee thanks, for thou hast answered me, and art become my salvation.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: [The] stone which the builders rejected hath become the head of the corner:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: This is of Jehovah; it is wonderful in our eyes.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: This is the day that Jehovah hath made; we will rejoice and be glad in it.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Oh save, Jehovah, I beseech thee; Jehovah, I beseech thee, oh send prosperity!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Blessed be he that cometh in the name of Jehovah. We have blessed you out of the house of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah isGod, and he hath given us light: bind the sacrifice with cords, — up to the horns of the altar.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou art myGod, and I will give thee thanks; myGod, I will exalt thee.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Give ye thanks unto Jehovah; for he is good; for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: ALEPH. Blessed are the perfect in the way, who walk in the law of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Blessed are they that observe his testimonies, that seek him with the whole heart;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Who also do no unrighteousness: they walk in his ways.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou hast enjoined thy precepts, to be kept diligently.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Oh that my ways were directed to keep thy statutes!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then shall I not be ashamed, when I have respect unto all thy commandments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will give thee thanks with uprightness of heart, when I shall have learned thy righteous judgments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will keep thy statutes: forsake me not utterly.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: BETH. Wherewithal shall a young man cleanse his path? by taking heed according to thy word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: With my whole heart have I sought thee: let me not wander from thy commandments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thy *word have I hid in my heart, that I might not sin against thee.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Blessed art thou, Jehovah! teach me thy statutes.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: With my lips have I declared all the judgments of thy mouth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have rejoiced in the way of thy testimonies, as [much as] in all wealth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will meditate upon thy precepts, and have respect unto thy paths.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I delight myself in thy statutes; I will not forget thy word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: GIMEL. Deal bountifully with thy servant [and] I shall live; and I will keep thy word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Open mine eyes, and I shall behold wondrous things out of thy law.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I am a stranger in the land; hide not thy commandments from me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: My soul breaketh for longing after thy judgments at all times.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou hast rebuked the proud [that are] cursed, who wander from thy commandments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Roll off from me reproach and contempt; for I observe thy testimonies.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Princes also did sit [and] talk together against me: thy servant doth meditate in thy statutes.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thy testimonies also are my delight [and] my counsellors.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: DALETH. My soul cleaveth unto the dust: quicken me according to thy word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have declared my ways, and thou hast answered me: teach me thy statutes.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Make me to understand the way of thy precepts, and I will meditate upon thy wondrous works.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: My soul melteth for sadness: strengthen me according to thy word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Remove from me the way of falsehood, and graciously grant me thy law.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have chosen the way of faithfulness; thy judgments have I set [before me].

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I cleave unto thy testimonies; Jehovah, let me not be ashamed.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will run the way of thy commandments when thou shalt enlarge my heart.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: HE. Teach me, O Jehovah, the way of thy statutes, and I will observe it [unto] the end.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Give me understanding, and I will observe thy law; and I will keep it with [my] whole heart.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Make me to walk in the path of thy commandments; for therein do I delight.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Incline my heart unto thy testimonies, and not to gain.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Turn away mine eyes from beholding vanity; quicken me in thy way.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Establish thy *word unto thy servant, who is [devoted] to thy fear.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Turn away my reproach which I fear; for thy judgments are good.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Behold, I have longed after thy precepts: quicken me in thy righteousness.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: VAU. And let thy loving-kindness come unto me, O Jehovah, — thy salvation according to thy *word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: So shall I have wherewith to answer him that reproacheth me; for I confide in thy word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And take not the word of truth utterly out of my mouth; because I have hoped in thy judgments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then will I keep thy law continually, for ever and ever;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And I will walk at liberty, for I have sought thy precepts;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And I will speak of thy testimonies before kings, and will not be ashamed;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And I will delight myself in thy commandments, which I have loved;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And I will lift up my hands unto thy commandments, which I have loved, and I will meditate in thy statutes.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: ZAIN. Remember the word for thy servant, upon which thou hast caused me to hope.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: This is my comfort in mine affliction; for thy *word hath quickened me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The proud have derided me beyond measure: I have not declined from thy law.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I remembered thy judgments of old, O Jehovah, and have comforted myself.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Burning indignation hath taken hold upon me because of the wicked who forsake thy law.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thy statutes have been my songs in the house of my pilgrimage.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have remembered thy name, O Jehovah, in the night, and have kept thy law.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: This I have had, because I have observed thy precepts.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: CHETH. My portion, O Jehovah, I have said, is to keep thy words.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have sought thy favour with [my] whole heart: be gracious unto me according to thy *word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have thought on my ways, and turned my feet unto thy testimonies.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have made haste, and not delayed, to keep thy commandments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The bands of the wicked have wrapped me round: I have not forgotten thy law.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: At midnight I rise up to give thanks unto thee, because of thy righteous judgments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I am the companion of all that fear thee, and of them that keep thy precepts.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The earth, O Jehovah, is full of thy loving-kindness: teach me thy statutes.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: TETH. Thou hast dealt well with thy servant, O Jehovah, according to thy word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Teach me good discernment and knowledge; for I have believed in thy commandments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Before I was afflicted I went astray, but now I keep thy *word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou art good, and doest good; teach me thy statutes.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The proud have forged falsehood against me: I will observe thy precepts with [my] whole heart.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Their heart is as fat as grease: as for me, I delight in thy law.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: It is good for me that I have been afflicted, that I might learn thy statutes.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The law of thy mouth is better unto me than thousands of gold and silver.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: YOD. Thy hands have made me and fashioned me: give me understanding, and I will learn thy commandments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They that fear thee will see me, and rejoice; because I have hoped in thy word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I know, Jehovah, that thy Judgments are righteousness, and that in faithfulness thou hast afflicted me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Oh let thy loving-kindness be for my comfort, according to thy *word unto thy servant.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let thy tender mercies come unto me, that I may live; for thy law is my delight.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let the proud be ashamed; for they have acted perversely towards me with falsehood: as for me, I meditate in thy precepts.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let those that fear thee turn unto me, and those that know thy testimonies.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let my heart be perfect in thy statutes, that I be not ashamed.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: CAPH. My soul fainteth for thy salvation; I hope in thy word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Mine eyes fail for thy *word, saying, When wilt thou comfort me?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For I am become like a bottle in the smoke; I do not forget thy statutes.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: How many shall be the days of thy servant? when wilt thou execute judgment on them that persecute me?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The proud have digged pits for me, which is not according to thy law.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: All thy commandments are faithfulness. They persecute me wrongfully: help thou me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They had almost consumed me upon the earth; but as for me, I forsook not thy precepts.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Quicken me according to thy loving-kindness, and I will keep the testimony of thy mouth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: LAMED. For ever, O Jehovah, thy word is settled in the heavens.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thy faithfulness is from generation to generation: thou hast established the earth, and it standeth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: By thine ordinances they stand this day; for all things are thy servants.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Unless thy law had been my delight, I should then have perished in mine affliction.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will never forget thy precepts; for by them thou hast quickened me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I am thine, save me; for I have sought thy precepts.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The wicked have awaited me to destroy me; [but] I attend unto thy testimonies.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have seen an end of all perfection: thy commandment is exceeding broad.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: MEM. Oh how I love thy law! it is my meditation all the day.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thy commandments make me wiser than mine enemies; for they are ever with me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have more understanding than all my teachers; for thy testimonies are my meditation.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I understand more than the aged, because I have observed thy precepts.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have refrained my feet from every evil path, that I might keep thy word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have not departed from thy judgments; for it is thou that hast taught me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: How sweet are thy *words unto my taste! more than honey to my mouth!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: From thy precepts I get understanding; therefore I hate every false path.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: NUN. Thy word is a lamp unto my feet, and a light unto my path.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have sworn, and I will perform it, that I will keep thy righteous judgments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I am afflicted very much; O Jehovah, quicken me according to thy word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Accept, I beseech thee, Jehovah, the voluntary-offerings of my mouth, and teach me thy judgments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: My life is continually in my hand; but I do not forget thy law.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The wicked have laid a snare for me; but I have not wandered from thy precepts.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thy testimonies have I taken as a heritage for ever; for they are the rejoicing of my heart.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have inclined my heart to perform thy statutes for ever, unto the end.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: SAMECH. The double-minded have I hated; but thy law do I love.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou art my hiding-place and my shield: I hope in thy word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Depart from me, ye evil-doers; and I will observe the commandments of myGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Uphold me according to thy *word, that I may live; and let me not be ashamed of my hope.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Hold thou me up, and I shall be safe; and I will have respect unto thy statutes continually.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou hast set at nought all them that wander from thy statutes; for their deceit is falsehood.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou puttest away all the wicked of the earth [like] dross; therefore I love thy testimonies.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: My flesh shuddereth for fear of thee; and I am afraid of thy judgments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: AIN. I have done judgment and justice: leave me not to mine oppressors.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Be surety for thy servant for good; let not the proud oppress me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Mine eyes fail for thy salvation, and for the *word of thy righteousness.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Deal with thy servant according to thy loving-kindness, and teach me thy statutes.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I am thy servant; give me understanding that I may know thy testimonies.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: It is time for Jehovah to work: they have made void thy law.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Therefore I love thy commandments above gold, yea, above fine gold.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Therefore I regard all [thy] precepts concerning all things to be right: I hate every false path.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: PE. Thy testimonies are wonderful; therefore doth my soul observe them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The entrance of thy words giveth light, giving understanding unto the simple.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I opened my mouth wide and panted; for I longed for thy commandments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Turn unto me, and be gracious unto me, as thou art wont to do unto those that love thy name.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Establish my steps in thy *word; and let not any iniquity have dominion over me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Deliver me from the oppression of man; and I will keep thy precepts.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Make thy face to shine upon thy servant, and teach me thy statutes.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Mine eyes run down with streams of water, because they keep not thy law.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: TZADE. Righteous art thou, Jehovah, and upright are thy judgments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou hast commanded thy testimonies in righteousness and exceeding faithfulness.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: My zeal destroyeth me, because mine oppressors have forgotten thy words.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thy *word is exceeding pure, and thy servant loveth it.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I am little and despised: thy precepts have I not forgotten.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thy righteousness is an everlasting righteousness, and thy law is truth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Trouble and anguish have taken hold upon me: thy commandments are my delights.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The righteousness of thy testimonies is for ever: give me understanding, and I shall live.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: KOPH. I have called with [my] whole heart; answer me, O Jehovah: I will observe thy statutes.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I call upon thee; save me, and I will keep thy testimonies.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I anticipate the morning-dawn and I cry: I hope in thy word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Mine eyes anticipate the night-watches, that I may meditate in thy *word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Hear my voice according to thy loving-kindness: O Jehovah, quicken me according to thy judgment.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They have drawn nigh that follow after mischief: they are far from thy law.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou, Jehovah, art near, and all thy commandments are truth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: From thy testimonies, I have known of old that thou hast founded them for ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: RESH. See mine affliction, and deliver me; for I have not forgotten thy law.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Plead my cause, and redeem me: quicken me according to thy *word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Salvation is far from the wicked; for they seek not thy statutes.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Many are thy tender mercies, O Jehovah; quicken me according to thy judgments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Many are my persecutors and mine oppressors; I have not declined from thy testimonies.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I beheld them that deal treacherously, and was grieved; because they kept not thy *word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: See how I have loved thy precepts: quicken me, O Jehovah, according to thy loving-kindness.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sum of thy word is truth, and every righteous judgment of thine is for ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: SHIN. Princes have persecuted me without a cause; but my heart standeth in awe of thy word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have joy in thy *word, as one that findeth great spoil.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I hate and abhor falsehood; thy law do I love.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Seven times a day do I praise thee because of thy righteous judgments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Great peace have they that love thy law, and nothing doth stumble them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have hoped for thy salvation, O Jehovah, and have done thy commandments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: My soul hath kept thy testimonies, and I love them exceedingly.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have kept thy precepts and thy testimonies; for all my ways are before thee.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: TAU. Let my cry come near before thee, Jehovah: give me understanding according to thy word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let my supplication come before thee: deliver me according to thy *word.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: My lips shall pour forth praise when thou hast taught me thy statutes.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: My tongue shall speak aloud of thy *word; for all thy commandments are righteousness.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let thy hand be for my help; for I have chosen thy precepts.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have longed for thy salvation, O Jehovah, and thy law is my delight.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let my soul live, and it shall praise thee; and let thy judgments help me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have gone astray like a lost sheep: seek thy servant; for I have not forgotten thy commandments.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: In my trouble I called unto Jehovah, and he answered me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah, deliver my soul from the lying lip, from the deceitful tongue.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: What shall be given unto thee, what shall be added unto thee, thou deceitful tongue?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Sharp arrows of a mighty one, with burning coals of broom-wood.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Woe is me, that I sojourn in Meshech, that I dwell among the tents of Kedar!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: My soul hath long dwelt with them that hate peace.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I [am for] peace; but when I speak, they [are] for war.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I lift up mine eyes unto the mountains: whence shall my help come?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: My help [cometh] from Jehovah, who made the heavens and the earth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He will not suffer thy foot to be moved; he that keepeth thee will not slumber.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Behold, he that keepeth Israel will neither slumber nor sleep.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah is thy keeper, Jehovah is thy shade upon thy right hand;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sun shall not smite thee by day, nor the moon by night.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah will keep thee from all evil; he will keep thy soul.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah will keep thy going out and thy coming in, from henceforth and for evermore.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I rejoiced when they said unto me, Let us go into the house of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Our feet shall stand within thy gates, O Jerusalem.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jerusalem, which art built as a city that is compact together,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Whither the tribes go up, the tribes of Jah, a testimony to Israel, to give thanks unto the name of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For there are set thrones for judgment, the thrones of the house of David.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Pray for the peace of Jerusalem: they shall prosper that love thee.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Peace be within thy bulwarks, prosperity within thy palaces.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For my brethren and companions' sakes I will say, Peace be within thee!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Because of the house of Jehovah ourGod I will seek thy good.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Unto thee do I lift up mine eyes, O thou that dwellest in the heavens.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Behold, as the eyes of servants [look] unto the hand of their masters, as the eyes of a maiden unto the hand of her mistress, so our eyes [are directed] to Jehovah ourGod, until he be gracious unto us.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Be gracious unto us, O Jehovah, be gracious unto us; for we are exceedingly filled with contempt.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Our soul is exceedingly filled with the scorning of those that are at ease, with the contempt of the proud.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: If it had not been Jehovah who was for us — oh let Israel say —

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: If it had not been Jehovah who was for us, when men rose up against us,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then they had swallowed us up alive, when their anger was kindled against us;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then the waters had overwhelmed us, a torrent had gone over our soul;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then the proud waters had gone over our soul.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Blessed be Jehovah, who gave us not up a prey to their teeth!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Our soul is escaped as a bird out of the snare of the fowlers: the snare is broken, and we have escaped.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Our help is in the name of Jehovah, the maker of heavens and earth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They that confide in Jehovah are as mount Zion, which cannot be moved; it abideth for ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jerusalem! — mountains are round about her, and Jehovah is round about his people, from henceforth and for evermore.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For the sceptre of wickedness shall not rest upon the lot of the righteous; lest the righteous put forth their hands unto iniquity.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Do good, O Jehovah, unto the good, and to them that are upright in their hearts.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But as for such as turn aside unto their crooked ways, Jehovah will lead them forth with the workers of iniquity. Peace be upon Israel!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: When Jehovah turned the captivity of Zion, we were like them that dream.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Then was our mouth filled with laughter, and our tongue with rejoicing: then said they among the nations, Jehovah hath done great things for them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah hath done great things for us; [and] we are joyful.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Turn our captivity, O Jehovah, as the streams in the south.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They that sow in tears shall reap with rejoicing:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He goeth forth and weepeth, bearing seed for scattering; he cometh again with rejoicing, bearing his sheaves.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Unless Jehovah build the house, in vain do its builders labour in it; unless Jehovah keep the city, the keeper watcheth in vain:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: It is vain for you to rise up early, to lie down late, to eat the bread of sorrows: so to his beloved one he giveth sleep.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Lo, children are an inheritance from Jehovah, [and] the fruit of the womb a reward.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: As arrows in the hand of a mighty man, so are the children of youth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Happy is the man that hath filled his quiver with them. They shall not be ashamed when they speak with enemies in the gate.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Blessed is every one that feareth Jehovah, that walketh in his ways.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For thou shalt eat the labour of thy hands; happy shalt thou be, and it shall be well with thee.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thy wife shall be as a fruitful vine in the inner part of thy house; thy children like olive-plants round about thy table.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Behold, thus shall the man be blessed that feareth Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah will bless thee out of Zion; and mayest thou see the good of Jerusalem all the days of thy life,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And see thy children's children. Peace be upon Israel!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Many a time have they afflicted me from my youth — oh let Israel say —

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Many a time have they afflicted me from my youth; yet they have not prevailed against me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The ploughers ploughed upon my back; they made long their furrows.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah is righteous: he hath cut asunder the cords of the wicked.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let them be ashamed and turned backward, all that hate Zion;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let them be as the grass upon the house-tops, which withereth before it is plucked up,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Wherewith the mower filleth not his hand, nor he that bindeth sheaves his bosom;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Neither do the passers-by say, The blessing of Jehovah be upon you; we bless you in the name of Jehovah!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Out of the depths do I call upon thee, Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Lord, hear my voice; let thine ears be attentive to the voice of my supplication.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: If thou, Jah, shouldest mark iniquities, Lord, who shall stand?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But there is forgiveness with thee, that thou mayest be feared.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I wait for Jehovah; my soul doth wait, and in his word do I hope.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: My soul [waiteth] for the Lord more than the watchers [wait] for the morning, [more than] the watchers for the morning.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let Israel hope in Jehovah, because with Jehovah there is loving-kindness, and with him is plenteous redemption;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he will redeem Israel from all his iniquities.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah, my heart is not haughty, nor mine eyes lofty; neither do I exercise myself in great matters, and in things too wonderful for me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Surely I have restrained and composed my soul, like a weaned child with its mother: my soul within me is as a weaned child.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let Israel hope in Jehovah, from henceforth and for evermore.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah, remember for David all his affliction;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: How he swore unto Jehovah, vowed unto the Mighty One of Jacob:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will not come into the tent of my house, I will not go up to the couch of my bed;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will not give sleep to mine eyes, slumber to mine eyelids,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Until I find out a place for Jehovah, habitations for the Mighty One of Jacob. ...

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Behold, we heard of it at Ephratah, we found it in the fields of the wood.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let us go into his habitations, let us worship at his footstool.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Arise, Jehovah, into thy rest, thou and the ark of thy strength.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let thy priests be clothed with righteousness, and let thy saints shout for joy.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For thy servant David's sake, turn not away the face of thine anointed.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah hath sworn [in] truth unto David; he will not turn from it: Of the fruit of thy body will I set upon thy throne;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: If thy children keep my covenant, and my testimonies which I will teach them, their children also for evermore shall sit upon thy throne.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For Jehovah hath chosen Zion; he hath desired it for his dwelling:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: This is my rest for ever; here will I dwell, for I have desired it.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will abundantly bless her provision; I will satisfy her needy ones with bread;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And I will clothe her priests with salvation, and her saints shall shout aloud for joy.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: There will I cause the horn of David to bud forth; I have ordained a lamp for mine anointed.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: His enemies will I clothe with shame; but upon himself shall his crown flourish.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Behold, how good and how pleasant it is for brethren to dwell together in unity!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Like the precious oil upon the head, that ran down upon the beard, upon Aaron's beard, that ran down to the hem of his garments;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: As the dew of Hermon that descendeth on the mountains of Zion; for there hath Jehovah commanded the blessing, life for evermore.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Behold, bless Jehovah, all ye servants of Jehovah, who by night stand in the house of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Lift up your hands in the sanctuary, and bless Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah, the maker of heavens and earth, bless thee out of Zion.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Hallelujah! Praise the name of Jehovah; praise, ye servants of Jehovah,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Ye that stand in the house of Jehovah, in the courts of the house of ourGod.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Praise ye Jah; for Jehovah is good: sing psalms unto his name; for it is pleasant.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For Jah hath chosen Jacob unto himself, Israel for his own possession.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For I know that Jehovah is great, and our Lord is above allgods.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Whatsoever Jehovah pleased, he hath done in the heavens and on the earth, in the seas and all deeps;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Who causeth the vapours to ascend from the ends of the earth; who maketh lightnings for the rain; who bringeth the wind out of his treasuries:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Who smote the firstborn of Egypt, both of man and beast;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Who sent signs and miracles into the midst of thee, O Egypt, upon Pharaoh and upon all his servants;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Who smote great nations, and slew mighty kings,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Sihon king of the Amorites, and Og king of Bashan, and all the kingdoms of Canaan;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And gave their land for an inheritance, an inheritance unto Israel his people.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thy name, O Jehovah, is for ever; thy memorial, O Jehovah, from generation to generation.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For Jehovah will judge his people, and will repent in favour of his servants.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The idols of the nations are silver and gold, the work of men's hands:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They have a mouth, and they speak not; eyes have they, and they see not;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They have ears, and they hear not; neither is there any breath in their mouth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They that make them are like unto them, — every one that confideth in them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
