translations.text: House of Israel, bless ye Jehovah; house of Aaron, bless ye Jehovah;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: House of Levi, bless ye Jehovah; ye that fear Jehovah, bless Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Blessed be Jehovah out of Zion, who dwelleth at Jerusalem! Hallelujah!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Give ye thanks unto Jehovah, for he is good; for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Give thanks unto theGod ofgods, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Give thanks unto the Lord of lords, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To him who alone doeth great wonders, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To him that by understanding made the heavens, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To him that stretched out the earth above the waters, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To him that made great lights, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The sun for rule over the day, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The moon and stars for rule over the night, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To him that smote Egypt in their firstborn, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And brought out Israel from among them, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: With a powerful hand and with a stretched-out arm, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To him that divided the Red sea into parts, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And made Israel to pass through the midst of it, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And overturned Pharaoh and his host in the Red sea, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To him that led his people through the wilderness, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To him that smote great kings, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And slew famous kings, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Sihon king of the Amorites, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And Og king of Bashan, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And gave their land for an inheritance, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: An inheritance unto Israel his servant, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Who hath remembered us in our low estate, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And hath delivered us from our oppressors, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Who giveth food to all flesh, for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Give ye thanks unto theGod of the heavens; for his loving-kindness [endureth] for ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: By the rivers of Babylon, there we sat down; yea, we wept when we remembered Zion.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: We hanged our harps upon the willows in the midst thereof.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For there they that carried us away captive required of us a song; and they that made us wail [required] mirth, [saying,] Sing us [one] of the songs of Zion.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: How should we sing a song of Jehovah's upon a foreign soil?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: If I forget thee, Jerusalem, let my right hand forget [its skill];

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: If I do not remember thee, let my tongue cleave to my palate: if I prefer not Jerusalem above my chief joy.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Remember, O Jehovah, against the sons of Edom, the day of Jerusalem; who said, Lay [it] bare, Lay [it] bare, down to its foundation!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Daughter of Babylon, who art to be laid waste, happy he that rendereth unto thee that which thou hast meted out to us.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Happy he that taketh and dasheth thy little ones against the rock.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will give thee thanks with my whole heart; before thegods will I sing psalms of thee.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will bow down toward the temple of thy holiness, and celebrate thy name for thy loving-kindness and for thy truth; for thou hast magnified thy word above all thy name.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: In the day when I called thou answeredst me; thou didst encourage me with strength in my soul.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: All the kings of the earth shall celebrate thee, Jehovah, when they have heard the words of thy mouth;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they shall sing in the ways of Jehovah, for great is the glory of Jehovah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For Jehovah is high; but he looketh upon the lowly, and the proud he knoweth afar off.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Though I walk in the midst of trouble, thou wilt revive me: thou wilt stretch forth thy hand against the anger of mine enemies, and thy right hand shall save me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah will perfect what concerneth me: thy loving-kindness, O Jehovah, [endureth] for ever; forsake not the works of thine own hands.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah, thou hast searched me, and known [me].

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou knowest my down-sitting and mine uprising, thou understandest my thought afar off;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou searchest out my path and my lying down, and art acquainted with all my ways;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For there is not yet a word on my tongue, [but] lo, O Jehovah, thou knowest it altogether.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou hast beset me behind and before, and laid thy hand upon me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: O knowledge too wonderful for me! it is high, I cannot [attain] unto it.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Whither shall I go from thy Spirit? and whither flee from thy presence?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: If I ascend up into the heavens thou art there; or if I make my bed in Sheol, behold, thou [art there];

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: [If] I take the wings of the dawn [and] dwell in the uttermost parts of the sea,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Even there shall thy hand lead me, and thy right hand shall hold me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And if I say, Surely darkness shall cover me, and the light about me be night;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Even darkness hideth not from thee, and the night shineth as the day: the darkness is as the light.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For thou hast possessed my reins; thou didst cover me in my mother's womb.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will praise thee, for I am fearfully, wonderfully made. Marvellous are thy works; and [that] my soul knoweth right well.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: My bones were not hidden from thee when I was made in secret, curiously wrought in the lower parts of the earth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thine eyes did see my unformed substance, and in thy book all [my members] were written; [during many] days were they fashioned, when [as yet] there was none of them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: But how precious are thy thoughts unto me, OGod! how great is the sum of them!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: [If] I would count them, they are more in number than the sand. When I awake, I am still with thee.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Oh that thou wouldest slay the wicked, OGod! And ye men of blood, depart from me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For they speak of thee wickedly, they take [thy name] in vain, thine enemies.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Do not I hate them, O Jehovah, that hate thee? and do not I loathe them that rise up against thee?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I hate them with perfect hatred; I account them mine enemies.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Search me, OGod, and know my heart; prove me, and know my thoughts;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And see if there be any grievous way in me; and lead me in the way everlasting.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Free me, O Jehovah, from the evil man; preserve me from the violent man:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Who devise mischiefs in [their] heart; every day are they banded together for war.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They sharpen their tongues like a serpent; adders' poison is under their lips. Selah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Keep me, O Jehovah, from the hands of the wicked [man], preserve me from the violent man, who devise to overthrow my steps.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The proud have hidden a snare for me, and cords; they have spread a net by the way-side; they have set traps for me. Selah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I have said unto Jehovah, Thou art myGod: give ear, O Jehovah, to the voice of my supplications.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah, the Lord, is the strength of my salvation: thou hast covered my head in the day of battle.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Grant not, O Jehovah, the desire of the wicked; further not his device: they would exalt themselves. Selah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: [As for] the head of those that encompass me, let the mischief of their own lips cover them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let burning coals fall on them; let them be cast into the fire; into deep waters, that they rise not up again.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let not the man of [evil] tongue be established in the earth: evil shall hunt the man of violence to [his] ruin.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I know that Jehovah will maintain the cause of the afflicted one, the right of the needy.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Yea, the righteous shall give thanks unto thy name; the upright shall dwell in thy presence.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah, I have called upon thee: make haste unto me; give ear unto my voice, when I call unto thee.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let my prayer be set forth before thee as incense, the lifting up of my hands as the evening oblation.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Set a watch, O Jehovah, before my mouth; keep the door of my lips.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Incline not my heart to any evil thing, to practise deeds of wickedness with men that are workers of iniquity; and let me not eat of their dainties.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let the righteous smite me, it is kindness; and let him reprove me, it is an excellent oil which my head shall not refuse: for yet my prayer also is [for them] in their calamities.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: When their judges are thrown down from the rocks, they shall hear my words, for they are sweet.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Our bones are scattered at the mouth of Sheol, as when one cutteth and cleaveth [wood] upon the earth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For unto thee, Jehovah, Lord, are mine eyes; in thee do I trust: leave not my soul destitute.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Keep me from the snare which they have laid for me, and from the traps of the workers of iniquity.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let the wicked fall into their own nets, whilst that I withal pass over.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I cry unto Jehovah with my voice: with my voice unto Jehovah do I make supplication.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I pour out my plaint before him; I shew before him my trouble.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: When my spirit was overwhelmed within me, then thou knewest my path. In the way wherein I walked have they hidden a snare for me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Look on the right hand and see; there is no man that knoweth me: refuge hath failed me; no man careth for my soul.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I cried unto thee, Jehovah; I said, Thou art my refuge, my portion in the land of the living.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Attend unto my cry, for I am brought very low; deliver me from my persecutors, for they are stronger than I.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Bring my soul out of prison, that I may celebrate thy name. The righteous shall surround me, because thou dealest bountifully with me.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah, hear my prayer; give ear to my supplications: in thy faithfulness answer me, in thy righteousness.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And enter not into judgment with thy servant; for in thy sight no man living shall be justified.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For the enemy persecuteth my soul: he hath crushed my life down to the earth; he hath made me to dwell in dark places, as those that have been long dead.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And my spirit is overwhelmed within me; my heart within me is desolate.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I remember the days of old: I meditate on all thy doing; I muse on the work of thy hands.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I stretch forth my hands unto thee: my soul, as a parched land, [thirsteth] after thee. Selah.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Answer me speedily, O Jehovah; my spirit faileth: hide not thy face from me, or I shall be like unto them that go down into the pit.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Cause me to hear thy loving-kindness in the morning, for in thee do I confide; make me to know the way wherein I should walk, for unto thee do I lift up my soul.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Deliver me, O Jehovah, from mine enemies: unto thee do I flee for refuge.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Teach me to do thy will; for thou art myGod: let thy good Spirit lead me in a plain country.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Revive me, O Jehovah, for thy name's sake; in thy righteousness bring my soul out of trouble;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And in thy loving-kindness cut off mine enemies, and destroy all them that oppress my soul: for I am thy servant.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Blessed be Jehovah my rock, who teacheth my hands to war, my fingers to fight;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: My mercy and my fortress, my high tower and my deliverer, my shield and he in whom I trust, who subdueth my people under me!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah, what is man, that thou takest knowledge of him, the son of man, that thou takest thought of him?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Man is like to vanity; his days are as a shadow that passeth away.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah, bow thy heavens, and come down; touch the mountains, that they smoke;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Cast forth lightnings, and scatter them; send forth thine arrows, and discomfit them:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Stretch out thy hands from above; rescue me, and deliver me out of great waters, from the hand of aliens,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Whose mouth speaketh vanity, and their right hand is a right hand of falsehood.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: OGod, I will sing a new song unto thee; with the ten-stringed lute will I sing psalms unto thee:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Who givest salvation unto kings; who rescuest David thy servant from the hurtful sword.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Rescue me, and deliver me from the hand of aliens, whose mouth speaketh vanity, and their right hand is a right hand of falsehood.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: That our sons may be as plants grown up in their youth; our daughters as corner-columns, sculptured after the fashion of a palace:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Our granaries full, affording all manner of store; our sheep bringing forth thousands, ten thousands in our pastures;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Our kine laden [with young]; no breaking in and no going forth, and no outcry in our streets.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Blessed the people that is in such a case! Blessed the people whoseGod is Jehovah!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will extol thee, myGod, O King, and I will bless thy name for ever and ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Every day will I bless thee, and I will praise thy name for ever and ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Great is Jehovah, and exceedingly to be praised; and his greatness is unsearchable.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: One generation shall laud thy works to another, and shall declare thy mighty acts.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: I will speak of the glorious splendour of thy majesty, and of thy wondrous works.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And they shall tell of the might of thy terrible acts; and thy great deeds will I declare.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They shall abundantly utter the memory of thy great goodness, and shall sing aloud of thy righteousness.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah is gracious and merciful; slow to anger, and of great loving-kindness.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah is good to all; and his tender mercies are over all his works.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: All thy works shall praise thee, Jehovah, and thy saints shall bless thee.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: They shall tell of the glory of thy kingdom, and speak of thy power;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To make known to the children of men his mighty acts, and the glorious splendour of his kingdom.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thy kingdom is a kingdom of all ages, and thy dominion is throughout all generations.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah upholdeth all that fall, and raiseth up all that are bowed down.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: The eyes of all wait upon thee; and thou givest them their food in its season.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Thou openest thy hand, and satisfiest the desire of every living thing.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah is righteous in all his ways, and kind in all his works.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah is nigh unto all that call upon him, unto all that call upon him in truth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He fulfilleth the desire of them that fear him; he heareth their cry, and saveth them.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah keepeth all that love him, and all the wicked will he destroy.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: My mouth shall speak the praise of Jehovah; and let all flesh bless his holy name for ever and ever.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Hallelujah! Praise Jehovah, O my soul.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: As long as I live will I praise Jehovah; I will sing psalms unto myGod while I have my being.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Put not confidence in nobles, in a son of man, in whom there is no salvation.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: His breath goeth forth, he returneth to his earth; in that very day his purposes perish.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Blessed is he who hath theGod of Jacob for his help, whose hope is in Jehovah hisGod,

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Who made the heavens and the earth, the sea and all that is therein; who keepeth truth for ever;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Who executeth judgment for the oppressed, who giveth bread to the hungry. Jehovah looseth the prisoners;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah openeth [the eyes of] the blind; Jehovah raiseth up them that are bowed down; Jehovah loveth the righteous;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah preserveth the strangers; he lifteth up the fatherless and the widow; but the way of the wicked doth he subvert.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah will reign for ever, [even] thyGod, O Zion, from generation to generation. Hallelujah!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Praise ye Jah! for it is good. Sing psalms of ourGod; for it is pleasant: praise is comely.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah doth build up Jerusalem: he gathereth the outcasts of Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He healeth the broken in heart, and bindeth up their wounds.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He counteth the number of the stars; he giveth names to them all.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Great is our Lord, and of great power: his understanding is infinite.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah lifteth up the meek; he abaseth the wicked to the earth.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Sing unto Jehovah with thanksgiving; sing psalms upon the harp unto ourGod:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Who covereth the heavens with clouds, who prepareth rain for the earth, who maketh grass to grow upon the mountains;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Who giveth to the cattle their food, to the young ravens which cry.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He delighteth not in the strength of the horse, he taketh not pleasure in the legs of a man;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Jehovah taketh pleasure in those that fear him, in those that hope in his loving-kindness.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Laud Jehovah, O Jerusalem; praise thyGod, O Zion.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For he hath strengthened the bars of thy gates; he hath blessed thy children within thee;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He maketh peace in thy borders; he satisfieth thee with the finest of the wheat.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He sendeth forth his oracles to the earth: his word runneth very swiftly.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He giveth snow like wool, scattereth the hoar frost like ashes;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He casteth forth his ice like morsels: who can stand before his cold?

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He sendeth his word, and melteth them; he causeth his wind to blow — the waters flow.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He sheweth his word unto Jacob, his statutes and his judgments unto Israel.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: He hath not dealt thus with any nation; and as for [his] judgments, they have not known them. Hallelujah!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Hallelujah! Praise Jehovah from the heavens; praise him in the heights.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Praise ye him, all his angels; praise ye him, all his hosts.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Praise him, sun and moon; praise him, all ye stars of light.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Praise him, ye heavens of heavens, and ye waters that are above the heavens.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let them praise the name of Jehovah, for he it is that commanded, and they were created:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he established them for ever and ever; he made [for them] a statute which shall not pass.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Praise Jehovah from the earth, ye sea-monsters, and all deeps;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Fire and hail, snow and vapour, stormy wind fulfilling his word;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Mountains and all hills, fruit-trees and all cedars;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Beasts and all cattle, creeping things and winged fowl;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Kings of the earth and all peoples, princes and all judges of the earth;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Both young men and maidens, old men with youths, —

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let them praise the name of Jehovah: for his name alone is exalted; his majesty is above the earth and the heavens.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: And he hath lifted up the horn of his people, the praise of all his saints, [even] of the children of Israel, a people near unto him. Hallelujah!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Hallelujah! Sing unto Jehovah a new song; [sing] his praise in the congregation of thegodly.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let Israel rejoice in his Maker; let the sons of Zion be joyful in their King.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let them praise his name in the dance; let them sing psalms unto him with the tambour and harp.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: For Jehovah taketh pleasure in his people; he beautifieth the meek with salvation.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let thegodly exult in glory; let them shout for joy upon their beds.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let the high praises ofGod be in their mouth, and a two-edged sword in their hand:

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To execute vengeance against the nations, [and] punishment among the peoples;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To bind their kings with chains, and their nobles with fetters of iron;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: To execute upon them the judgment written. This honour have all his saints. Hallelujah!

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Hallelujah! PraiseGod in his sanctuary; praise him in the firmament of his power.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Praise him in his mighty acts; praise him according to the abundance of his greatness.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Praise him with the sound of the trumpet; praise him with lute and harp;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Praise him with the tambour and dance; praise him with stringed instruments and the pipe;

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Praise him with loud cymbals; praise him with high sounding cymbals.

translations.name: Darby Bible
translations.text: Let everything that hath breath praise Jah. Hallelujah!
